name: HWR_EMP_SKILL_PREF
description: This table stores the employee skill preferences information

columns.Name: GLBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the global profile id.

columns.Name: FUS_PRFL_ID#01
columns.Comments: This column stores the fusion profile ID.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the topic id.

columns.Name: TOPIC_KEY
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the topic key.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the catgory id.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_KEY
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the category key.

columns.Name: IS_NEW
columns.Comments: This column indicates if it is new.

columns.Name: PROFICIENCY
columns.Comments: This column contains the proficiency id of the skill

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
